name: elsa bloodstone
bio: Born into a line of legendary monster hunters, Elsa Bloodstone boasts incredible physical prowess and an innate talent for subduing the creepiest of creatures. The instinct to hunt is in her blood, and every foe she faces inevitably becomes prey ensnared in her traps!

abilities.name: Inherited Instinct
abilities.description: Dealing damage increases hunting <Orange>Instinct</>. Defeating enemies caught by <Orange>Smoky Snare</> grants additional <Orange>Instinct</>. Higher <Orange>Instinct</> reduces the cooldown of <Orange>Helix Advance</>.

additional_fields.Special Effect 1: Instinct levels up when it reaches 100, up to 3 levels
additional_fields.Special Effect 2: For each Instinct level gained, reduce the cooldown of Helix Advance by 2s

additional_fields.Fire Rate: The firing interval between shots is 0.12s, with an interval of 0.8s between each round of shooting
additional_fields.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 70% at 30m

abilities.name: Monster-piercer
abilities.description: Unleash your elephant gun forward. Bullets pierce enemies and deal high damage.

abilities.name: Ruthless Pursuit
abilities.description: Dash forward, gaining <Buff>Bonus Health</> and launching enemies hit. Follow up with a <Orange>Double-Barrel Blaster</> shot that propels you backward and <Debuff>Slows</> enemies. Using either stage empowers your next <Orange>Double-Barrel Blaster</>, transforming it into <Orange>Monster-Piercer</>.

additional_fields.Bonus Health: Every unleash of Ruthless Pursuit and Helix Advance grants 30 bonus health. Max bonus health is 75
additional_fields.Special Effect 1: Launch up enemies hit, and activate the follow up in 5s
additional_fields.Special Effect 2: Using either stage empowers your next Double-Barrel Blaster, transforming it into Monster-Piercer

abilities.name: Helix Advance
abilities.description: Dash in your movement direction. Your next <Orange>Double-Barrel Blaster</> becomes <Orange>Monster-Piercer</>.

additional_fields.Special Effect: In 6s after unleashing Helix Advance, the next Double-Barrel Blaster becomes Monster-Piercer
additional_fields.Special Effect 2: Every unleash of Ruthless Pursuit and Helix Advance grants 30 bonus health. Max bonus health is 75

abilities.name: Living Bullet
abilities.description: Fire a Living Bullet round that splits upon impact, seeking nearby enemies and marking each with a <Orange>Spectral Sigil</>. Hitting marked targets with <Orange>Double-Barrel Blaster</> or <Orange>Monster-Piercer</> grants Elsa a brief <Buff>Speed</> boost. Living Bullets deal extra damage to shields and enemies with <Buff>Bonus Health</>.

additional_fields.Special Effect 1: After hits an enemy, the projectile splits to several bullets to trace the enemies in range
additional_fields.Special Effect 2: Projectile deals 40 extra damage to shields and enemies with bonus health

abilities.name: Bloodstone's Boombox Bullets
abilities.description: Deadpool hands Jeff the Land Shark a plushie. Jeff can spit it ahead where it'll continuously <Debuff>Taunt</> nearby enemies and <Debuff>Block Vision</>, while allies in range are healed! Elsa Bloodstone's <Orange>Living Bullet</> changes to special rounds that <Debuff>Taunt</> targets with Deadpool's chatter, while <Debuff>Slowing</>, and damaging nearby enemies over time. Elsa can recall the rounds to heal based on damage dealt.

abilities.name: Smoky Snare
abilities.description: Launch a trap containing the monster Diablo. Once deployed, it becomes <Buff>Invisible</> and <Buff>Invulnerable</>. When an enemy triggers it, Diablo <Debuff>Immobilizes</> and Damages them. Use {Interactive} to dash to the trapped enemy. Enemies can destroy Diablo to break free.

additional_fields.Special Effect 1: The trap becomes Invisible and Invulnerable after one-second deployment
additional_fields.Special Effect 2: Defeat the summon to end the Immobolized state early
additional_fields.Special Effect 3: Elsa can dash to the enemy who triggers the trap

abilities.name: Apex Predator
abilities.description: Summon the Glartrox to charge forward. The Glartrox can be recalled to charge back toward Elsa. When colliding with terrain or upon return, it bites fiercely, dealing heavy damage.

additional_fields.Special Effect: Glartrox cannot be critical hit. Drag 8 targets at most
additional_fields.Special Effect 1: Enemies seized by Glartrox cannot use their abilities until it stops moving
additional_fields.Special Effect 2: Elsa can recall Glartrox at any time
additional_fields.Special Effect 3: When the Glartrox collides with terrain, returns, or reaches its maximum dash duration, it bites fiercely, dealing massive damage. If Glartrox is defeated, the bite will not be triggered
additional_fields.Glartrox Maximum Dash Duration: Maximum durations for dashing and returning are 3.5s each
